task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into LibreHealth EHR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard or main interface is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the user/provider configuration section for 'Admin'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A user management, address book, or provider settings screen showing the profile or configuration options for the provider 'Admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the section to configure insurance/billing numbers for the provider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, table, or modal specifically designated for entering 'Insurance Numbers', 'Provider Numbers', or billing configurations for the selected provider.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected 'Blue Cross Blue Shield' as the insurance company.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, search field, or table row showing 'Blue Cross Blue Shield' selected or entered as the insurance company.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct Provider Number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact value 'BCBS-8842-X' is visible in the 'Provider Number' input field associated with Blue Cross Blue Shield.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct Group Number and saved the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact value 'GRP-99104' is visible in the 'Group Number' input field, and there is evidence of the record being saved (e.g., a success message, or the numbers appearing in a saved list/table of insurance numbers for the provider).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreHealth EHR web interface rather than using backend scripts or database commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the LibreHealth EHR GUI, not a terminal window executing SQL or curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the data into the EHR system forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs for provider and group numbers appear within the actual LibreHealth EHR form fields, not in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open in the screenshots showing the final configured numbers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target provider is 'Admin', the default system user. Target insurance company is 'Blue Cross Blue Shield' (a synthetic test entry). Expected Provider Number is 'BCBS-8842-X'. Expected Group Number is 'GRP-99104'.
